The '''Red Nebula temple guardian''' was a giant hairy beast who, along with a [[Unidentified priest (Red Nebula)|priest]], was charged with protecting the sacred crimson jewels which were important to the temple priests. When [[Han Solo/Legends|Han Solo]] and [[Chewbacca/Legends|Chewbacca]] were forced by [[Klysk]] to attempt to steal the gems, they encountered the beast. But instead of attacking them she took hold of Chewbacca and cuddled him as though he were her cub. With the guardian distracted, Solo was free to take the gems from the temple and give them to Klysk.<ref name="marvel50" />

{{Char-stub}}

==Behind the scenes==
She appears to share the same prolific stature as the [[Gorax/Legends|Goraxes]], the [[Bobog]], and the [[Grudakk]]. However, it is unknown if any of them share the same genetic ancestry.
